title: Senior AI Software Engineer
description: Building next-gen LLM interfaces using React and local inference engines. Experience with WebGPU and Transformers.js is a massive plus. High ownership and impact role.

title: Staff Frontend Architect
description: Leading the transition to a modern, high-performance UI stack. Deep expertise in React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. We value clean code and exceptional user experiences.

title: Rust Backend Developer
description: Developing ultra-secure backend systems in Rust. Performance is everything. Working on distributed systems and cryptographically secured APIs.

title: Product Designer (UI/UX)
description: Designing beautiful, intuitive interfaces for creative professionals. Proficiency in Figma and a strong eye for typography and motion design are required.

title: Full Stack Developer (Next.js)
description: Joining a fast-growing team in the fintech space. Building scalable web applications with Next.js, Node.js, and PostgreSQL. Focus on reliability and security.
